title: GROUP TAG climax — 8-character friendship-tag (Nano Banana pre-render)

preRenderRequired.command: python3 content/generateGroupShot.py everyones_it_group_still --chars sara,eva,papa,isabel,leo --extras 3 --pose 'group-tag freeze-frame on green tennis court, 8 figures arranged in soft semicircle: papa center on hands and knees as silly tag-monster, sara left of papa hands raised cheering, eva right of papa hands clapping, isabel kneeling left foreground touching the ground (it!), leo standing right foreground with both hands raised, 3 unnamed friend-kids in midground at various happy poses, all wearing kid clothes, helmets visible on sara and eva, all on green court, soft warm afternoon light, all smiling' --scene tennis-court --n 3

preRenderNote: Pick the cleanest of 3 candidates, then upload to Kling library as 'everyones-it-still'. This locks the 8-character composition before Kling video animation — eliminates ghost extras + count drift. memory: lesson_nano_banana_group_shot.md
prompt: Wide cinematic kid-show friendship-tag freeze-frame at @tennis-court — green court with white lines softly visible UNDERNEATH, soft warm afternoon light. The composition is anchored by the @everyones-it-still pre-rendered group shot (8 characters in a soft semicircle). The Kling animation gently brings the still to life — characters smile and wave warmly, hands held up, gentle in-place sway, NO walking, NO running, NO position changes. POSITION LOCK — every character stays in their EXACT same spot from the source still. Only soft sways, smiles, gentle hand-waves change between beats. Exactly EIGHT people in the entire frame, matching the still: Sara (helmet on), Eva (helmet on), Papa (silly tag-monster crouch on hands-and-knees CENTER), Isabel (kneeling foreground LEFT touching ground as the 'it' tagger), Leo (standing foreground RIGHT both arms up), 3 unnamed friend-kids softly in midground. NO additional kids appear, NO extras spawn. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) The whole group sways gently in unison from their exact frozen poses, smiling warmly at each other. Soft cheerful kid-laughter ambiance. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) The whole group raises one hand together in a soft cheerful unison wave at the camera (or each other), smiles widening. All eight kids and Papa sharing a cheerful warm friendship-celebration moment together. STRICT ANATOMY: each character has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Each character stays in their EXACT same physical spot from the still — no walking, no running, no leaping, no climbing on each other. Papa stays on hands-and-knees in his tag-monster pose. The tennis court stays plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris. NO scary faces, NO crashing, NO falling. Pure friendship-celebration warmth.
